revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Malaysia/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Malaysia/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23359502324|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Malaysia%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Malaysia%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the thirteen [[states of Malaysia]] and the three [[Federal Territory (Malaysia)|federal territories]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[:en:Template:Country data Johor|Template:Country data Johor]] || {{flag|Johor}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Kedah|Template:Country data Kedah]] || {{flag|Kedah}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Kelantan|Template:Country data Kelantan]] || {{flag|Kelantan}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Malacca|Template:Country data Malacca]] || {{flag|Malacca}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Negeri Sembilan|Template:Country data Negeri Sembilan]] || {{flag|Negeri Sembilan}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Pahang|Template:Country data Pahang]] || {{flag|Pahang}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Perak|Template:Country data Perak]] || {{flag|Perak}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Perlis|Template:Country data Perlis]] || {{flag|Perlis}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Penang|Template:Country data Penang]] || {{flag|Penang}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Sabah]] || {{flag|Sabah}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Sarawak|Template:Country data Sarawak]] || {{flag|Sarawak}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Selangor|Template:Country data Selangor]] || {{flag|Selangor}}
|-
| [[:en:Template:Country data Terengganu|Template:Country data Terengganu]] || {{flag|Terengganu}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Federal Territory (Malaysia)]] || {{flag|Federal Territory (Malaysia)}}
|-
|style="padding-left:2em"| [[Template:Country data Kuala Lumpur]] || {{flag|Kuala Lumpur}}
|-
|style="padding-left:2em"| [[Template:Country data Labuan]] || {{flag|Labuan}}
|-
|style="padding-left:2em"| [[Template:Country data Putrajaya]] || {{flag|Putrajaya}}
|}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of countries|Malaysia]]
[[Category:Country data templates of Malaysia| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
